aboutus.heroSubtitle: We are your strong partner for demanding construction projects in the commercial, industrial, and public sectors.
aboutus.visionText1: Octabau stands for precision, reliability, and efficiency. As a general contractor or specialized service provider, we take responsibility for smooth implementation in large-scale projects – on time and within budget.
aboutus.visionText2: With an experienced team and a strong network of professional partners, we cover all relevant construction phases. From initial project coordination to turnkey handover. We don't just build buildings, we create value.
aboutus.qualityText: We work according to the highest industry standards and rely on modern construction technologies and sustainable materials.

contactPage.heroSubtitle: Do you have a specific construction project? Our project team is available for an initial consultation.

projectsPage.heroSubtitle: An excerpt of our successfully completed projects in the commercial and public sectors.
projectsPage.ctaSubtitle: Contact our experienced team for an initial assessment.

projectsList.title: Sparkasse Herne
projectsList.beschreibung: Casting the reinforced safe vault, installing block wall partitions, and comprehensive drywall construction.

projectsList.title: Police Academy Herne
projectsList.beschreibung: Tiling, drywall partitioning, puttying (spachtel), painting, and electrical installations for a modern training facility.

projectsList.title: Hattingen University
projectsList.beschreibung: Extensive plastering work across 3 separate buildings to prepare surfaces for final painting.

projectsList.title: Düsseldorf Airport
projectsList.beschreibung: Suspended drywall ceilings including complete installation of modern lighting systems.

leistungenPage.heroSubtitle: We cover the entire lifecycle of your construction project – from initial preparation to final handover.
leistungenPage.serviceText: As an experienced partner for large-scale projects, we gladly take over the entire control of all trades upon request. This gives you a single point of contact and maximum planning security.

homePage.heroTitle:
We build the future
of your visions.
homePage.heroSubtitle: Octabau is your professional partner for large-scale construction projects, commercial buildings, and complex construction logistics. From planning to turnkey handover.
homePage.phasesSubtitle: A holistic approach for maximum efficiency and quality.

phases.title: Project Preparation & Planning
phases.desc: Coordination, consulting, and organization for a smooth start.

phases.title: Interior Fit-out & Design
phases.desc: Interior fit-out, drywall, painting, and facade work at the highest level.

phases.title: Logistics, Transport & Service
phases.desc: Efficient construction logistics and material transport for on-time processes.

phases.title: Handover, Cleaning & Support
phases.desc: Final construction cleaning and property preparation for perfect turnkey handover.

phases.title: Demolition & Preparation
phases.desc: Professional demolition, gutting, and preparation of the construction site.

homePage.whyText: As an established construction company, we understand the complexity of large construction projects. Commercial builders, investors, and the public sector trust our expertise.
whyList: Reliability: Schedule adherence and transparent cost control.
Quality: Highest standards across all construction phases.
Competence: An experienced team of experts and skilled workers.
Holistic: From preparation to final cleaning, everything from a single source.

shortProjects.title: Industrial Facility 2
shortProjects.desc: Special deep foundation and building construction.

homePage.regionsSubtitle: We realize projects throughout Germany, with a special focus on economically strong metropolitan regions.
homePage.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk together about the realization of your vision.

regionsPage.heroSubtitle: Octabau operates for you throughout Germany. Select a state to learn more about our regional locations and specific construction projects.
regionsPage.nationalDesc: For complex construction projects above a certain volume, we take on holistic project management across state borders.
